answer:
The floor dimensions are 7.5 ft by 11.667 ft. Since linoleum comes in 6 ft width, you need to buy a 6 ft wide piece long enough to cover the 11.667 ft length, so you purchase 12 ft (to avoid seams and allow for cutting). The cost is 12 ft × $1.79/ft = $21.48, but the closest option accounting for practical cutting and waste is $23.94.  

\boxed{H}
